name: Y'shtola Rhul | FFXIV ARR
description:
One day during your return to the Walking Sands you find it mostly empty, only with your Miqo'te conjurer friend around, the beautiful Y'shtola Rhul.
Never did an early Y'Shtola, well, noone did, so here she is! Pre-blinded, pre-fully matured, younger and more sarcastic.
From Final Fantasy 14 A Realm Reborn
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
